textByHash.2d29c08a2871da541a5cdc9c30a974fa9fbd79be: Thanks so much for saving me from being a vampyre. Here, take this certificate, I'm sorry but it's all I can offer as a reward.
textByHash.4ba691dd0f1e57a40f26d36dc248502debb2950e: Thanks for changing me back, it must have been hard for you. I must be off now.
